target: Game mechanics and Exit Quiz evaluation bug fixes
summary: Tested reported bug fixes for: 1) Game mechanics marking correct answers incorrectly, 2) Exit Quiz evaluation stuck on fail. Backend API tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Vocabulary module shows 'Correct!'/'The answer is:' feedback correctly, Matching Game pairs turn green when matched correctly with counter update. Code review confirms Exit Quiz handleRetry function properly resets all states (idx, answers, showResults, showFeedback, fillBlankValue).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility improvement)

vocabulary_feedback.description: Correct answer shows green border and 'Correct!' text. Wrong answer shows red border and 'The answer is: {word}' text.

matching_game.description: Matched pairs turn green with checkmark icon. Counter updates (e.g., '1 / 6 matched'). Wrong pairs reset selection without registering match.
matching_game.evidence: Screenshot 10_matching_correct.png showing hello pair matched with green background

exit_quiz_retry.description: handleRetry function (lines 729-735) properly resets: setIdx(0), setAnswers({}), setShowResults(false), setShowFeedback(false), setFillBlankValue(''). Try Again button shown when score < pass_threshold.

exit_quiz_per_question_feedback.description: showFeedback state shows 'Correct!' or 'Incorrect' text after each answer (lines 836-845). Answer review in results page shows each question with user answer and correct answer (lines 749-762).

error_hunter_game.description: Now tracks userChoice state (null|true|false) instead of boolean 'answered'. Feedback shows based on isCorrectAnswer = userChoice === item.has_error (line 494).

critical_code_review_comments: All bug fixes verified through code review - implementation looks correct
Exit Quiz handleRetry resets all 5 state variables properly
MatchingGame uses functional state updater: setMatchedPairs(prev => [...prev, selectedWord])
ErrorHunterGame tracks userChoice for proper feedback colors instead of just 'answered' boolean

success_rate.frontend: Partial UI testing - core features verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified via code review and partial UI testing. Vocabulary feedback works (Correct!/wrong message). Matching game pairs turn green. Exit Quiz code has proper retry mechanism. Consider full E2E test through all 10 activity steps if time permits. Login credentials: geldiaga67@gmail.com/geldiaga67. Exit Quiz fill_blank answer is 'Goodbye'.
testing_notes: UI automation struggled to complete all 10 activities in sequence due to various selectors and state management. Core bug fixes verified through code review of UnifiedLessonPage.js. Backend APIs all return correct data structures for exit_ticket (4 questions, 70% threshold), micro_game_vocab (6 matching items), vocabulary (8 words).
